data.name: 男子大学的生活与性 - 第一季💕🔞
data.detailed_description:
关于这个游戏

男子大学的生活与性》是一部成人视觉小说，你将控制一个20岁的女孩，当她进入只有男人学习的大学时，她的生活被颠覆了。

她是为男人们找乐子，还是能找到真爱？

视觉小说描述[/b］
我的名字是丽莎。碰巧的是，在我在机械工程学院学习的第二年，由于父亲的去世，我们家不得不紧急搬到另一个城市。幸运的是，也有这样一所学院，我被及时转学，并在不耽误课程的情况下发出。但学生的水平，以及整个技校本身的水平，比我在家乡的水平要低几倍。
当然，一个偏远的省城，有愚蠢的暴徒，而不是像我这样负责任和自觉的学生。在我到新地方学习的第一天，就发生了一件事，从根本上改变了我的整个人生......


特点

- 高清渲染图
- 耐人寻味的故事
- 弗兰克的场景
- 故事以真实生活为基础
- 可以用一只手玩

data.short_description: 男子大学的生活与性》是一部成人视觉小说，其中你将控制一个20岁的女孩，当她进入只有男人学习的大学时，她的生活被颠覆了。她会为男人们带来乐趣，还是会找到真爱？

data.name: Life and Sex in Men's Сollege - Season 1 💕🔞
data.detailed_description:
About the game

Life and Sex in Men's Сollege is a adult Visual Novel in witch you take control of an 20 year old girl whose life is turned up side down when she went to college where only guys study.

Will she be fun for the guys or will she find true love?

Visual Novel Description

My name is Lisa. It so happened that in the midst of my second year of study at a mechanical engineering college, our family urgently had to move to another city because of my father's death. Fortunately, there was also a college of this profile and I was promptly transferred and issued without losing the course. But the level of students, and of the technical school itself as a whole, was several times lower than that of me in my hometown.
Of course, a remote provincial town with stupid thugs instead of responsible and conscientious students like me. And on the very first day of my studies in a new place something happened that radically changed my whole life...


Features

- HD renders
- Intriguing story
- Explicit scenes
- The story is based on real life
- Can be played with one hand
